message:
fix(clippy): resolve 37 clippy warnings across 26 files in frankenterm-core

- Replace 20 manual Default impls with #[derive(Default)] + #[default] on enum variants
- Remove dead code: unused count_steps method in workflows.rs
- Fix returning let binding in fibonacci_heap.rs
- Collapse 4 nested if statements (learn.rs, output_compression.rs, storage.rs, tantivy_ingest.rs)
- Use struct literal syntax instead of field assignment outside initializer (recorder_audit.rs, recorder_export.rs)
- Change &PathBuf to &Path in restore_process.rs function signatures
- Use explicit () match pattern in search_bridge.rs
- Use expression form for txn_open assignment in storage.rs

Remaining 11 warnings are all "too many arguments" (10) and "complex type" (1)
which require significant signature refactoring to address.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
